crime.value: Bank robbery of $6.5 million cash from New York City Bank
crime.quote: Yeah foo, we got a big baby here, about 6.5 million in cash!

victim.value: New York City Bank (institutional victim of robbery)
victim.quote: As he passed the New York City Bank he noticed a mysterious blue truck parked a few feet away

culprit_and_motive.value: Donny White and gang members committed robbery for financial gain
culprit_and_motive.quote: In the truck was Donny White and four other men

investigator.value: Officer Randy Bright, 15-year veteran police officer on patrol
investigator.quote: Officer Randy Bright, an officer who had served 15 years, was in his car patrolling the streets

social_world.value: Criminal gang hierarchy with police authority structure - gang members answering to leader Donny, police patrol system
social_world.quote: Officer Randy Bright, an officer who had served 15 years, was in his car patrolling the streets
